message:
chore(beads): close frankentorch-mbl

The fix landed in 82f9f68; this records the close on the JSONL.
Both this agent (cc_1) and another swarm agent independently
converged on the same fix (80 -> 200 Adam iters), which is fine —
the diffs converged by content, not just intent.
